question: What is the time zone of Salt Lake City?
gold_query: PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/> SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { res:Salt_Lake_City <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/timeZone> ?uri }

question: Who killed Caesar?
gold_query: PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> PREFIX dbc: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Category:> SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?uri dct:subject dbc:Assassins_of_Julius_Caesar }

question: What is the highest mountain in Germany?
gold_query: PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX onto: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> SELECT ?uri WHERE { ?uri rdf:type onto:Mountain ; onto:elevation ?elevation ; onto:locatedInArea <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Germany> } ORDER BY DESC(?elevation) LIMIT 1

question: Which American presidents were in office during the Vietnam War?
generated_query: SELECT ?president WHERE { ?president a dbo:AmericanPresident . ?war dbr:Vietnam_War . ?war dbo:commander ?president . }
generated_execution_error:
HTTP 400: Virtuoso 37000 Error SP030: SPARQL compiler, line 2: syntax error at '.' before '?war'

SPARQL query:
#output-format:application/sparql-results+json
SELECT ?president WHERE { ?president a dbo:AmericanPresident . ?war dbr:Vietnam_War . ?war dbo:commander ?president . }
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> PREFIX dbc: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Category:> SELECT ?uri WHERE { ?uri dct:subject dbc:Presidents_of_the_United_States . res:Vietnam_War dbo:commander ?uri }

question: How many gold medals did Michael Phelps win at the 2008 Olympics?
generated_query: SELECT (COUNT(?medal) AS ?goldMedals) WHERE { dbr:Michael_Phelps dbo:medal ?medal . FILTER(?medal = dbr:Gold_medal) FILTER EXISTS { dbr:Michael_Phelps dbo:participatedIn dbr:2008_Summer_Olympics } }
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT Count(?sub) as ?c WHERE { ?sub dbo:goldMedalist dbr:Michael_Phelps . filter (contains (str(?sub), "2008") && contains (str(?sub), "Olympics")) }

question: Which artists were born on the same date as Rachel Stevens?
generated_query: SELECT ?artist WHERE { dbr:Rachel_Stevens dbo:birthDate ?birthDate . ?artist dbo:birthDate ?birthDate . ?artist a dbo:Artist . }
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?uri a dbo:Artist . dbr:Rachel_Stevens dbo:birthDate ?birthdate . ?uri dbo:birthDate ?birthdate }

question: What is the profession of Frank Herbert?
gold_query: PREFIX dbpedia2: <http://dbpedia.org/property/> PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> SELECT DISTINCT ?string WHERE { res:Frank_Herbert dbpedia2:occupation ?string }

question: Are Taiko some kind of Japanese musical instrument?
generated_query: SELECT ?instrument WHERE { dbr:Taiko rdf:type ?instrument . FILTER(?instrument IN (dbo:MusicalInstrument, yago:MusicalInstrument)) }
gold_query: ASK WHERE { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Taiko> a <http://dbpedia.org/class/yago/WikicatJapaneseMusicalInstruments> }

question: How many seats does the home stadium of FC Porto have?
generated_query: SELECT (COUNT(?seats) AS ?totalSeats) WHERE { dbr:FC_Porto dbo:homeGround ?stadium . ?stadium dbo:capacity ?seats . }
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/> PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX db: <http://dbpedia.org/> SELECT ?capacity WHERE { { dbr:FC_Porto dbo:ground ?ground . ?ground dbo:capacity ?capacity } UNION { dbr:FC_Porto dbo:ground ?ground . ?ground dbp:capacity ?capacity } }

question: Which frequent flyer program has the most airlines?
generated_query: SELECT ?program (COUNT(?airline) AS ?airlineCount) WHERE { ?program a dbo:FrequentFlyerProgram . ?airline dbo:memberOf ?program . } GROUP BY ?program ORDER BY ?airlineCount DESC LIMIT 1
generated_execution_error:
HTTP 400: Virtuoso 37000 Error SP030: SPARQL compiler, line 2: syntax error at 'LIMIT' before '1'

SPARQL query:
#output-format:application/sparql-results+json
SELECT ?program (COUNT(?airline) AS ?airlineCount) WHERE { ?program a dbo:FrequentFlyerProgram . ?airline dbo:memberOf ?program . } GROUP BY ?program ORDER BY ?airlineCount DESC LIMIT 1
gold_query: SELECT ?uri WHERE { ?airline <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Airline> . ?airline <http://dbpedia.org/property/frequentFlyer> ?uri. } GROUP BY ?uri ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(DISTINCT ?airline)) OFFSET 0 LIMIT 1

question: Which European countries have a constitutional monarchy?
generated_query: SELECT ?country WHERE { ?country a dbo:Country . ?country dbo:governmentType dbr:Constitutional_monarchy . ?country dbo:wikiPageWikiLink dbr:Europe . }
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> PREFIX dbc: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Category:> PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> SELECT ?uri WHERE { ?uri dct:subject dbc:Countries_in_Europe ; dbo:governmentType dbr:Constitutional_monarchy }

question: Which countries have places with more than two caves?
generated_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?country WHERE { ?place dbo:country ?country . ?place dbo:cave ?cave . } GROUP BY ?country HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?cave) > 2)
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?cave rdf:type dbo:Cave ; dbo:location ?uri . ?uri rdf:type dbo:Country } GROUP BY ?uri HAVING ( COUNT(?cave) > 2 )

question: Which airports are located in California, USA?
generated_query: SELECT ?airport WHERE { ?airport rdf:type dbo:Airport . ?airport dbo:location dbr:California . }
gold_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?uri a <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Airport> { ?uri <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/location> <http://dbpedia.org/resource/California> } UNION { ?uri <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/city> <http://dbpedia.org/resource/California> } UNION { ?uri <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/city> ?city . ?city <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/isPartOf> <http://dbpedia.org/resource/California> } UNION { ?uri <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/operator> <http://dbpedia.org/resource/California> } }

question: What is Angela Merkel’s birth name?
gold_query: PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/> SELECT DISTINCT ?string WHERE { res:Angela_Merkel dbp:birthName ?string }

question: Which countries in the European Union adopted the Euro?
generated_query: SELECT ?country WHERE { ?country a dbo:Country . ?country dbo:currency dbr:Euro . }
gold_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?uri a <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Country> { ?uri <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/currency> <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Euro> } UNION { ?uri <http://dbpedia.org/property/currencyCode> "EUR"@en } }

question: Which software has been published by Mean Hamster Software?
gold_query: PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX onto: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX prop: <http://dbpedia.org/property/> SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?uri rdf:type onto:Software { ?uri prop:publisher "Mean Hamster Software"@en } UNION { ?uri onto:publisher res:Mean_Hamster_Software } }

question: Which country was Bill Gates born in?
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?country WHERE { { dbr:Bill_Gates dbo:birthPlace ?birthPlace . ?birthPlace dbo:country ?country } UNION { dbr:Bill_Gates dbo:birthPlace ?birthPlace . ?birthPlace dbo:isPartOf ?place . ?place dbo:country ?country } }

question: How many grand-children did Jacques Cousteau have?
generated_query: SELECT (COUNT(?grandchild) AS ?numberOfGrandchildren) WHERE { dbr:Jacques_Cousteau dbo:child ?child . ?child dbo:child ?grandchild . }
gold_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ?y AS ?y) WHERE { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Jacques_Cousteau> <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/child> ?x . ?x <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/child> ?y . }

question: Give me all professional skateboarders from Sweden.
generated_query: SELECT ?skateboarder WHERE { ?skateboarder rdf:type dbo:Skateboarder . ?skateboarder dbo:birthPlace ?place . ?place rdfs:label "Sweden" . }
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/> PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?uri dbo:occupation dbr:Skateboarder { ?uri dbo:birthPlace dbr:Sweden } UNION { ?uri dbo:birthPlace ?place . ?place dbo:country dbr:Sweden } }

question: Give me all Argentine films.
generated_query: SELECT ?film WHERE { ?film a dbo:Film . ?film dbo:country dbr:Argentina . }
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX yago: <http://dbpedia.org/class/yago/> PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { { ?uri rdf:type yago:ArgentineFilms } UNION { ?uri rdf:type dbo:Film { ?uri dbo:country res:Argentina } UNION { ?uri dbp:country "Argentina"@en } } }

question: How did Michael Jackson die?

gold_values: "Cardiac arrest caused by acute propofol intoxication"@en
only_in_gold: "Cardiac arrest caused by acute propofol intoxication"@en

question: Which U.S. state has been admitted latest?
generated_query: SELECT ?state WHERE { ?state rdf:type dbo:State . ?state dbp:currentNumber ?number } ORDER BY DESC(?number) LIMIT 1

question: Which classes does the Millepede belong to?

question: Who painted The Storm on the Sea of Galilee?
gold_query: PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/> SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { res:The_Storm_on_the_Sea_of_Galilee dbo:author ?uri }

question: What is the highest place of Karakoram?
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { res:Karakoram dbp:highest ?uri }

question: Which actors play in Big Bang Theory?

question: Who wrote Harry Potter?

question: Give me all writers that won the Nobel Prize in literature.

gold_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?uri a <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Writer> ; <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/award> <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Nobel_Prize_in_Literature> }

question: Give me English actors starring in Lovesick.
generated_query: SELECT ?actor WHERE { ?actor dbo:wikiPageWikiLink dbr:Lovesick . ?actor a dbo:Actor . ?actor dbo:birthPlace ?place . FILTER(?place = dbr:United_Kingdom) }
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Lovesick_(1983_film)> dbo:starring ?uri . ?uri dbo:birthPlace ?city . ?city dbo:country <http://dbpedia.org/resource/United_Kingdom> }

question: What is the nick name of Baghdad?
gold_query: PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/> SELECT ?nm WHERE { dbr:Baghdad foaf:nick ?nm }

question: In which city was the president of Montenegro born?
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?x <http://dbpedia.org/property/title> dbr:President_of_Montenegro ; dbo:birthPlace ?uri . ?uri dbo:type dbr:Capital_city }

question: What is the longest river in China?
generated_query: SELECT ?river WHERE { ?river rdf:type dbo:River . ?river dbo:country dbr:China . ?river dbo:length ?length . } ORDER BY DESC(?length) LIMIT 1
gold_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?uri a <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/River> ; <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/country> <http://dbpedia.org/resource/China> ; <http://dbpedia.org/property/length> ?l } ORDER BY DESC(?l) OFFSET 0 LIMIT 1

question: What is the area code of Berlin?
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> SELECT DISTINCT ?string WHERE { res:Berlin dbo:areaCode ?string }

question: How many scientists graduated from an Ivy League university?
generated_query: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?scientist) AS ?numberOfScientists) WHERE { ?scientist dbo:almaMater ?university . ?university a dbo:Organisation . ?university rdfs:label ?label . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?label), "ivy")) }
gold_query: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?uri) AS ?c) WHERE { ?uri a <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Scientist> ; <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/almaMater> ?university . ?university <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/affiliation> <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Ivy_League> ; a <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/University> }

question: Which professional surfers were born in Australia?
generated_query: SELECT ?surfer WHERE { ?surfer a dbo:Surfer . ?surfer dbo:birthPlace dbr:Australia . }
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { { ?uri dbo:occupation res:Surfer ; dbo:birthPlace res:Australia } UNION { ?uri dbo:occupation res:Surfer ; dbo:birthPlace ?place . ?place dbo:country res:Australia } }

question: Give me all Dutch parties.
generated_query: SELECT ?party WHERE { ?party a dbo:PoliticalParty . ?party dbo:country dbr:Netherlands . }
gold_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?uri a <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/PoliticalParty> ; <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/country> <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Netherlands> }

question: How many moons does Mars have?
gold_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?n WHERE { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Mars> <http://dbpedia.org/property/satellites> ?n }

question: What is Batman's real name?
gold_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?label WHERE { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Batman> <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/name> ?label FILTER ( str(?label) != "Batman" ) }

question: How many years was the Ford Model T manufactured?
generated_query: SELECT (COUNT(?year) AS ?manufacturedYears) WHERE { dbr:Ford_Model_T dbo:productionStartYear ?startYear . dbr:Ford_Model_T dbo:productionEndYear ?endYear . BIND(?endYear - ?startYear AS ?year) }
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> SELECT ?years WHERE { res:Ford_Model_T dbo:productionEndYear ?end ; dbo:productionStartYear ?start. BIND ( ( year(xsd:date(?end)) - year(xsd:date(?start)) ) AS ?years) }

question: When was Carlo Giuliani shot?
gold_query: PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/> SELECT DISTINCT xsd:date(?date) WHERE { res:Death_of_Carlo_Giuliani dbo:deathDate ?date }

question: Give me all animals that are extinct.
generated_query: SELECT ?animal WHERE { ?animal a dbo:Animal . ?animal dbo:status dbr:Extinct . }
gold_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?uri a <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Animal> ; <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/conservationStatus> "EX" }

question: Who was the wife of President Lincoln?
gold_query: PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> PREFIX onto: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> SELECT ?uri ?string WHERE { dbr:Abraham_Lincoln onto:spouse ?uri }

question: How many awards has Bertrand Russell?
gold_query: PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/> SELECT (COUNT(?Awards) AS ?Counter) WHERE { dbr:Bertrand_Russell dbp:awards ?Awards }

question: Is Pamela Anderson a vegan?
gold_query: PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> ASK WHERE { dbr:Pamela_Anderson a <http://dbpedia.org/class/yago/WikicatAmericanVegans> }
generated_values: ""I always say the win is in the work...I got to do something I really love, and I needed to do that for my soul.""@en
only_in_generated: ""I always say the win is in the work...I got to do something I really love, and I needed to do that for my soul.""@en

question: Which German cities have more than 250000 inhabitants?
generated_query: SELECT ?city WHERE { ?city a dbo:City . ?city dbo:populationTotal ?population . FILTER(?population > 250000) }
gold_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { { ?uri a <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/City> } UNION { ?uri a <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Town> } ?uri <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/country> <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Germany> ; <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/populationTotal> ?population FILTER ( ?population > 250000 ) }

question: Who is the daughter of Robert Kennedy married to?
generated_query: SELECT ?spouse WHERE { dbr:Robert_Kennedy dbo:children ?child . ?child dbo:spouse ?spouse . FILTER(?child = dbr:Kerry_Kennedy) }
gold_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Robert_F._Kennedy> <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/child> ?child . ?child <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/spouse> ?uri }

question: What is the revenue of IBM?
gold_query: PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> PREFIX onto: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> SELECT ?number WHERE { res:IBM onto:revenue ?number }

gold_query: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?uri) AS ?c) WHERE { ?uri dct:subject <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Category:James_Bond_films> }

question: Who was Tom Hanks married to?
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { dbr:Tom_Hanks dbo:spouse ?uri }

question: Give me all cars that are produced in Germany.
generated_query: SELECT ?car WHERE { ?car rdf:type dbo:Car . ?car dbo:manufacturer dbr:Germany . }
gold_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?uri a <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Automobile> { ?uri <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/assembly> <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Germany> } UNION { ?uri <http://dbpedia.org/property/assembly> <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Germany> } UNION { { ?uri <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/manufacturer> ?x } UNION { ?uri <http://dbpedia.org/property/manufacturer> ?x } { ?x <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/locationCountry> <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Germany> } UNION { ?x <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/location> <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Germany> } } }

question: When did Michael Jackson die?
gold_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?date WHERE { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Michael_Jackson> <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/deathDate> ?date }

question: What is the highest volcano in Africa?
generated_query: SELECT ?volcano WHERE { ?volcano a dbo:Volcano . ?volcano dbo:elevation ?elevation . FILTER(?elevation = (SELECT MAX(?elevation) WHERE { ?v a dbo:Volcano . ?v dbo:elevation ?elevation })) }
gold_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?uri a <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Volcano> ; <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/locatedInArea> ?area . ?area dct:subject dbc:Countries_in_Africa . ?uri <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/elevation> ?elevation } ORDER BY DESC(?elevation) LIMIT 1

question: Which poet wrote the most books?
generated_query: SELECT ?poet (COUNT(?book) AS ?bookCount) WHERE { ?poet a dbo:Poet . ?book dbo:author ?poet . } GROUP BY ?poet ORDER BY DESC(?bookCount) LIMIT 1
gold_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?uri <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/occupation> <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Poet> . ?x <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/author> ?uri . ?x <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Book> . } ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(?x)) OFFSET 0 LIMIT 1

question: Show me all Czech movies.

gold_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?uri a <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Film> ; <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/country> <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Czech_Republic> }

question: Give me all taikonauts.
generated_query: SELECT ?taikonaut WHERE { ?taikonaut a dbo:Astronaut . ?taikonaut dbo:country dbr:China . }
gold_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { { ?uri a <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Astronaut> ; <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/nationality> <http://dbpedia.org/resource/People's_Republic_of_China> } UNION { ?uri a <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Astronaut> ; <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/nationality> <http://dbpedia.org/resource/China> } }

question: Which countries have more than ten volcanoes?
generated_query: SELECT ?country WHERE { ?country a dbo:Country . ?volcano a dbo:Volcano . ?volcano dbo:locatedIn ?country . } GROUP BY ?country HAVING (COUNT(?volcano) > 10)
gold_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?x a <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Volcano> ; <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/locatedInArea> ?uri . ?uri a <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Country> } GROUP BY ?uri HAVING ( COUNT(?x) > 10 )

question: Give me all movies with Tom Cruise.
generated_query: SELECT ?movie WHERE { ?movie a dbo:Film . ?movie dbo:starring dbr:Tom_Cruise . }
gold_query: PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX onto: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX prop: <http://dbpedia.org/property/> SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?uri rdf:type onto:Film { ?uri prop:starring res:Tom_Cruise } UNION { ?uri onto:starring res:Tom_Cruise } OPTIONAL { ?uri rdfs:label ?string FILTER ( lang(?string) = "en" ) } }

question: Give me all female German chancellors.
